metadata.name: JLCPCB 4-layer (standard)
metadata.process_notes: Standard-process defaults for JLCPCB's standard 4-layer flow (process tier: standard multilayer, 0.5oz inner / 1oz outer, 1.6 mm FR-4). Numbers are published standard-process values (min trace/space 3.5 mil / 0.09 mm, min via drill 0.15 mm, min annular ring 0.13 mm, aspect ratio 8:1) and MUST be confirmed against JLCPCB's current capabilities datasheet before relied upon. high_speed_si checks remain enabled because JLCPCB offers controlled-impedance service on 4-layer builds.
